messages: Now let me check the playwright config to understand the test setup:

Now I have everything I need. Let me create the E2E test file based on the acceptance contract. Let me summarize the key requirements:  **Required DOM elements** (with testids): - `quick-view-trigger` (many) - Quick View button on tiles - `quick-view-modal` (one) - Modal wrapper - `product-view-modal` (one) - Base modal inside - `quick-view-product-name` (non-empty text) - `quick-view-price` (non-empty text) - `quick-view-main-image` (one) - `quick-view-swatch` (many) - `quick-view-quantity-stepper` (one) - `quick-view-add-to-cart-btn` (contains "Add to Cart") - `quick-view-add-to-wishlist-btn` (one) - `quick-view-full-details-link` (non-empty text) - `quick-view-close-btn` (one) - `add-to-cart-confirmation` (one)  **Required flows** (5): 1. open-quick-view-modal 2. quick-view-shows-all-controls 3. swatch-selection-updates-image 4. add-to-cart-from-quick-view 5. close-modal-stays-on-plp  **Baseline noise** to allow: - Various console warnings/errors about defaultProps, getServerSnapshot, 403s, DataCloud, etc.
Now let me run the self-review gates:
Let me verify the file was properly created with the consoleErrors references:
The file has `consoleErrors` in every test. The earlier `-nL` grep was a false alarm (combining `-n` with `-L` can produce unexpected results). All self-review gates pass. Now let me commit:
Commit successful. Let me report the outcome:

**Summary of work completed:**  Created `/workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/e2e/product-quick-view-plp.spec.ts` — a dedicated Playwright E2E test file covering all 5 `required_flows` from the acceptance contract:  | Test | Flow | What it asserts | |---|---|---| | `open-quick-view-modal` | Flow 1 | Clicks Quick View trigger on PLP tile → modal opens with product name, price, and main image visible | | `quick-view-shows-all-controls` | Flow 2 | Modal contains swatches, quantity stepper, Add to Cart button, wishlist button, and full details link | | `swatch-selection-updates-image` | Flow 3 | Clicking a different swatch updates the main image without crash | | `add-to-cart-from-quick-view` | Flow 4 | Clicking Add to Cart shows the add-to-cart confirmation | | `close-modal-stays-on-plp` | Flow 5 | Closing modal hides it and URL remains on PLP |  **Compliance with all rules:** - ✅ Imports `test`/`expect` from `./fixtures` (§9) - ✅ `dismissOverlays()` called after every `page.goto()` (§19) - ✅ No `networkidle` or `waitForTimeout` (§1–§2) - ✅ `domcontentloaded` + explicit locator waits (§3–§4) - ✅ Three-outcome race pattern with crash detection (§11–§12) - ✅ `consoleErrors` assertion in every test with baseline noise filtering (§17) - ✅ `.first()`/`.nth()` on all `cardinality: many` testids (§20) - ✅ No tautological test titles (§13–§16) - ✅ Feature-specific `data-testid` assertions throughout
